recentArticles.title: Jaime King reveals status of Taylor Swift friendship after her son — the singer’s godson — is left out of MSG wedding - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: ##### Jaime King reveals status of Taylor Swift friendship after her... # Jaime King reveals status of Taylor Swift friendship after her son — the singer’s godson — is left out of MSG wedding. The actress is addressing speculation surrounding her relationship with Taylor Swift after her son — the pop star’s godson, 10-year-old Leo Newman — was not among the children at Swift’s star-studded wedding to Travis Kelce last week. “The reason Jaime chose Taylor as Leo Thames’s godmother is because they both believe that being a godmother is a deeply personal and spiritual commitment that has nothing to do with public appearances,” King’s publicist, Jane Owen, exclusively told Page Six. The statement comes one day after Page Six exclusively reported that none of Swift’s five godchildren — including Leo — attended the singer’s wedding festivities with Kelce. “Jaime made Taylor her son’s godmother for a reason and she wants to continue that friendship,” the source said at the time.
recentArticles.summary: Jaime King reveals status of Taylor Swift friendship after her son — the singer’s godson — is left out of MSG wedding - Page Six

recentArticles.title: My Son Found A Hero In Jalen Brunson. I Found A Piece Of My Dad I Thought Was Gone. - HuffPost
recentArticles.snippet: I Found A Piece Of My Dad I Thought Was Gone. “Jalen Plays It All” has been announced at the perfect moment for a 5-year-old superfan and a grandfather’s legacy waiting to be passed down. Growing up in New York City meant that I was constantly surrounded by Knicks fans — and my father was a particularly influential one in my life. When my dad passed, I accepted that watching the Knicks would not spark the same joy for me. But when I had my son, Zakai, I suspected that he’d inherit my dad’s passion for our home team. While he now has his dad, who is also a Knicks superfan, to teach him all about the game’s history and technical aspects, it has been heartwarming to see Brunson open up a new world to my son. And so, I can’t wait to get our copy of “Jalen Plays It All” and read it to him with all of the enthusiasm and pride that my father would.
recentArticles.summary: My Son Found A Hero In Jalen Brunson. I Found A Piece Of My Dad I Thought Was Gone. - HuffPost

recentArticles.title: NCT’s Jaehyun drops self-written song - The Korea Herald
recentArticles.snippet: # NCT’s Jaehyun drops self-written song. Add The Korea Herald on Google. Jaehyun of NCT is releasing the solo single “99 Degrees” online on Friday, label SM Entertainment said. A music video will support the single, and the trailer unveiled Thursday highlighted different sides of the idol, from the shining star on stage to a casual self rambling on streets. The single comes after his five-city solo fan concert tour across Asia, which concluded last week. The overseas trip marked his first reunion with fans in the region since he was discharged from the military in May. Jaehyun, along with four members of NCT127, will bring out their seventh LP on Aug. 24, and will have a concert in Seoul the following month. SK hynix seals $26.5b Nasdaq listing, world's biggest offering since SpaceX. SK hynix has priced its Nasdaq offering of American depositary receipts at $149 apiece, setting the deal at about $26.5 billion.
recentArticles.summary: NCT’s Jaehyun drops self-written song - The Korea Herald

recentArticles.title: Edi Rama, artist and Albanian PM, defends Kanye West concert - MSN
recentArticles.snippet: # Micro LED CPO“光进铜退”加速器？Micro LED光模块开启数据中心光互连新局！附股）. 光进铜退Micro LED CPO光互连，根据TrendForce集邦咨询最新调查，随着生成式AI兴起，数据中心对高速传输的需求持续提升，原先应用在机柜内(Intra-Rack)短距传输的铜缆方案，将在传输密度与节能上面临严峻挑战。相比之下，Micro LED CPO方案的单位传输能耗较低，可大幅降低整体能耗至铜缆方案的5%，有望凭节能优势成为光互连替代方案。. 光进铜退Micro LED CPO是一种将Micro LED芯片与AI计算芯片（如ASIC）通过先进封装技术集成的新型光互连方案。其核心是通过Micro LED替代传统铜缆或激光器作为光源，实现芯片级光信号传输，突破传统光模块的物理限制，满足AI数据中心对高密度、低延迟、低功耗的严苛需求。. 天风证券表示，当今数据中心网络中的链路技术必须在传输距离、功耗和可靠性之间做出根本性权衡。铜缆链路能效高且可靠性强，但传输距离极为有限（<2m），若使用有源铜缆，传输距离预计提升至5-7m，但随着带宽速率进一步提升，对铜缆传输距离的挑战将进一步加大。光链路可提供更长的传输距离，却以高功耗和较低可靠性为代价。随着网络速度的提升（1.6T/3.2T），这种权衡关系愈发显著，制约着未来的可扩展性。. Micro LED的制造面临量产难、巨量转移技术难度大、高昂成本、产业链配套等诸多问题，不过在2025年，Micro LED行业巨量转移良率问题得到解决，比如Q-Pixel发布Q-Transfer技术实现超过99.9995%的转移良率。2025年9月，佳明推出全球首款Micro LED智能手表Fenix 8 Pro，表明Micro LED技术在智能手表上已具备商业化能力。此外AI数据中心光互连也有着巨大吸引，国泰海通认为Micro LED行业已迎来涅槃重生，并有望在未来不断扩大应用场景、市场规模。. 随着应用场景的不断扩大，市场对于Micro LED的市场空间也充满了乐观预期。根据Omdia数据，2025年Micro LED显示器收入为5240万美元，预计2026年将增长至1.05亿美元，同比增幅达100%。. TrendForce集邦咨询预测，Micro LED显示应用芯片产值将从2024年的基数快速攀升，预计2029年达7.4亿美元，2024-2029年复合增长率达93% 。. 更远点看，Omdia预计，到2032年Micro LED显示器市场规模将扩大至68亿美元，占平板显示器市场总额的4.4% 。. 兆驰股份：Micro LED全产业链；外延/芯片/封装，具备CPO技术迁移能力。. 聚飞光电：Micro LED+Mini LED+CPO；参股熹联光芯（硅光芯片用于CPO），自身有光模块封装。公司的主营业务为LED封装，MicroLED是LED发展的最终形态，具有小型化，低功耗等优点。公司的MicroLED产品主要应用于显示终端，收入占比较低。目前公司MicroLED技术未应用于CPO领域，也未因CPO产生收入。. 沃格光电：玻璃基板叠加Mini/Micro LED，沃格光电2023年半年报显示，近三年，公司已与多家行业知名企业开展玻璃基在 Mini / Micro 直显产品的合作开发应用,目前有多个项目在开展。. 京东方A：2020年报显示公司已积极进行Mini/Macro LED研发与产品布局，无疑是Macro LED产业链第一梯队。. TCL科技：2021年7月12日回复称公司针对Micro-LED显示技术持续投入,与三安成立联合实验室聚焦Micro-LED技术开发,推动公司在该领域从材料、工艺、设备、产线方案到自主知识产权的生态布局,并形成Micro-LED商业化规模量产的工艺流程解决方案。. 维信诺：2021年8月5日回复称公司参股公司成都辰显光电近日成功点亮326ppi的1.84英寸Micro-LED可穿戴产品。成都辰显光电是公司与成都国资投资平台共同投资设立的MicroLED项目运营主体,围绕巨量转移、驱动与检测、芯片设计、彩色化等关键技术展开研发、生产工作。. 利亚德：其无锡的子公司，利晶微是和台湾晶元光电合资的企业，主要是Micro LED的全流程产线，厦门是利亚德全资的二期产线，正在建设。参股 赛富乐斯（Saphlux），获得其 NPQD 量子点红光 Micro LED 芯片的独家供应权，目前来说利亚德的核心优势就是Micro LED 的封装巨量转移技术，这个目前只有利亚德是唯一成熟的几年的产线经验了。. $华灿光电(SZ300323)$$TCL科技(SZ000100)$$三安光电(SH600703)$. #炒股日记##机构：Micro LED CPO开启数据中心互连新局#. **郑重声明：**用户在社区发表的所有信息将由本网站记录保存，仅代表作者个人观点，与本网站立场无关，不对您构成任何投资建议，据此操作风险自担。**请勿相信代客理财、免费荐股和炒股培训等宣传内容，远离非法证券活动。请勿添加发言用户的手机号码、公众号、微博、微信及QQ等信息，谨防上当受骗！**. 郑重声明：东方财富网发布此信息的目的在于传播更多信息，与本站立场无关。东方财富网不保证该信息（包括但不限于文字、视频、音频、数据及图表）全部或者部分内容的准确性、真实性、完整性、有效性、及时性、原创性等。相关信息并未经过本网站证实，不对您构成任何投资建议，据此操作，风险自担。. 信息网络传播视听节目许可证：0908328号 经营证券期货业务许可证编号：913101046312860336 违法和不良信息举报:021-61278686 举报邮箱：jubao@eastmoney.com. 沪ICP证:沪B2-20070217 网站备案号:沪ICP备05006054号-11  沪公网安备 31010402000120号 版权所有:东方财富网 意见与建议:4000300059/952500.

recentArticles.title: Jason Kelce Breaks Silence on Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift’s Wedding After Serving as Best Man - E! News
recentArticles.snippet: # Jason Kelce Breaks Silence on Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift’s Wedding After Serving as Best Man. Jason Kelce finally shared his opinion on Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's July 3 wedding, during which he acted as his brother's Best Man while Austin Swift was his sister's Man of Honor. Watch: Jason Kelce Breaks Silence on Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift’s Wedding After Serving as Best Man. The former Philadelphia Eagles center finally spilled the beans—albeit still very few—on his experience inside Madison Square Garden for his brother **Travis Kelce**’s July 3 wedding to **Taylor Swift**, during which Jason acted as Travis' Best Man while **Austin Swift** served as Taylor's Man of Honor. Since the start of Travis and Taylor’s love story, Jason and his wife **Kylie Kelce**—who are parents to daughters **Wyatt**, 6, **Elliotte**, 5, **Bennett**, 3 and **Finnley**, 16 months—have been two of the couple’s biggest cheer captains. For more about how Taylor and Travis took their wedding day to new heights, keep reading.
recentArticles.summary: Jason Kelce Breaks Silence on Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift’s Wedding After Serving as Best Man - E! News

recentArticles.title: This free S.F. jazz festival is back after a funding scare - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # This free S.F. jazz festival is back after a funding scare. Faced with a lack of funds to pay for $400,000 in yearly operating expenses, the Fillmore Jazz Festival had to cancel just two months before its July Fourth weekend start date in 2025. On Saturday-Sunday, July 4-5, the festival fills 12 blocks of Jackson and Eddy streets with more than 30 free jazz performances on five stages, as well as food and clothes vendors. Davis Cuffe is a Dow Jones News Fund multiplatform editing intern at the San Francisco Chronicle working with the copy desk, where he edits print, digital and newsletter content for style and accuracy. Cuffe is a recent graduate of the University of North Carolina at Charlotte, where he served as the editor-in-chief of the student newspaper, the Niner Times.

recentArticles.title: Why Jalen Brunson’s New Children’s Book Makes Me So Emotional - HuffPost
recentArticles.snippet: Part of HuffPost Black Voices. # My Son Found A Hero In Jalen Brunson. “Jalen Plays It All” has been announced at the perfect moment for a 5-year-old superfan and a grandfather’s legacy waiting to be passed down. Growing up in New York City meant that I was constantly surrounded by Knicks fans — and my father was a particularly influential one in my life. But when I had my son, Zakai, I suspected that he’d inherit my dad’s passion for our home team. While he now has his dad, who is also a Knicks superfan, to teach him all about the game’s history and technical aspects, it has been heartwarming to see Brunson open up a new world to my son. And so, I can’t wait to get our copy of “Jalen Plays It All” and read it to him with all of the enthusiasm and pride that my father would.
recentArticles.summary: Why Jalen Brunson’s New Children’s Book Makes Me So Emotional - HuffPost

recentArticles.title: My Son Found A Hero In Jalen Brunson. I Found A Piece Of My Dad I Thought Was Gone. - Yahoo Sports
recentArticles.snippet: # My Son Found A Hero In Jalen Brunson. I Found A Piece Of My Dad I Thought Was Gone. But when I had my son, Zakai, I suspected that he'd inherit my dad's passion for our home team. And through the roars of a crowd who were just as hopeful as my dad, I'd witness him come alive with hope and excitement. The Knicks created a space for his joy, and I loved to see it. While he now has his dad, who is also a Knicks superfan, to teach him all about the game's history and technical aspects, it has been heartwarming to see Brunson open up a new world to my son. And so, I can't wait to get our copy of "Jalen Plays It All" and read it to him with all of the enthusiasm and pride that my father would.
recentArticles.summary: My Son Found A Hero In Jalen Brunson. I Found A Piece Of My Dad I Thought Was Gone. - Yahoo Sports

recentArticles.title: MONSTA X’s Kihyun Has Been Everywhere But Now Is At The ‘BORDERLINE’ - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # MONSTA X’s Kihyun Has Been Everywhere But Now Is At The ‘BORDERLINE’. Now in his 30s and with over 10 years in the music industry, he’s ready to show a deeper, more mature side of himself with his new EP, *BORDERLINE*. The concepts shown for *BORDERLINE* with Kihyun at the airport and surrounded by travel elements make so much sense, as he’s become so worldly throughout his young life. The seven-track pop-rock-driven EP isn’t so much about his youth and the nostalgia behind it as about the complex road he’s on now. Known best to his fans as the gentleman of the group (all of them are, but Kihyun is so fancy), he has always been seen as the level-headed one who seems to know what he’s doing or where he’s headed.
recentArticles.summary: MONSTA X’s Kihyun Has Been Everywhere But Now Is At The ‘BORDERLINE’ - Forbes

recentArticles.title: Jermaine Dupri Sues Sony Music for $18 Million Over Unpaid Mariah Carey, Usher Royalties - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: *   Plus Icon What To Watch. *   Plus Icon What To Hear. Plus Icon Click to expand the Mega Menu. Jermaine Dupri has filed an $18 million lawsuit against Sony Music Entertainment, alleging that the company failed to properly pay royalties for releases from Mariah Carey, Usher, Xscape, Kris Kross and more. The suit, filed on Monday and reviewed by _Variety_, accuses SME of having “not been lawful” in its dealings with Dupri dating back to May 1992, when his imprint So-So Def Entertainment entered into an agreement with the company. Dupri’s attorneys detail a long pattern of unpaid royalties, including $960,000 in unpaid producer royalties for Xscape’s “Hummin’ Comin’ At ‘Cha” and over $1 million for Da Brat’s “Funkdafied.” The suit also claims there were understated royalties payable to So-So Def in connection with albums released by Carey, Bow Wow, Usher, J-Kwon, Dupri and Bone Crusher.
recentArticles.summary: Jermaine Dupri Sues Sony Music for $18 Million Over Unpaid Mariah Carey, Usher Royalties - Variety

recentArticles.title: Ella Mai asks S.F. fans: ‘Do You Still Love Me?’ - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # Ella Mai asks S.F. fans: ‘Do You Still Love Me?’. After nearly seven years away from the Bay Area, Ella Mai is returning to ask her fans a major question: “Do You Still Love Me?”. But it wasn’t until several years later, in 2018, that she made waves in the mainstream with her breakout single “Boo’d Up,” which went on to earn her a Grammy Award for best R&B song. Mai released her third studio album — “Do You Still Love Me?” — in February, her first since the 2024 birth of her first child. The singer-songwriter is now scheduled to perform at San Francisco’s Bill Graham Civic Auditorium on July 18, along with supporting acts AMA and Girlfriend. She joined the Chronicle as a summer 2023 intern for the Datebook team. Irshad was part of the honors program for her major and double-minored in world literature and film studies.

recentArticles.title: Milo Ventimiglia and Wife Jarah Mariano Welcome Baby No. 2 - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: # Milo Ventimiglia and Wife Jarah Mariano Welcome Baby No. 2. ## Milo Ventimiglia & Jarah Mariano Saying Hey to Baby No. 2!!! **Milo Ventimiglia** and wife **Jarah Mariano** have officially welcomed baby No. 2!!! Sources with direct knowledge tell TMZ the "This Is Us" actor and the model welcomed their second child in June -- this time, a baby boy. We're told the couple became a family of four last month in the Newport Beach area, naming their son **Rock-Anthony Makoa Ventimiglia**. His arrival comes just over a year after the birth of their first child, daughter **Ke'ala Cora**. The growing family marks another milestone for Ventimiglia and Mariano, who have kept much of their relationship out of the spotlight. They surprised fans with news of their first pregnancy in 2024 and welcomed daughter Ke'ala later that year. Last year, the family also endured heartbreak after losing their Malibu home in the devastating Los Angeles-area wildfires, making the arrival of baby Rock-Anthony an especially joyful chapter.
recentArticles.summary: Milo Ventimiglia and Wife Jarah Mariano Welcome Baby No. 2 - TMZ

recentArticles.title: Angine de Poitrine, Patrick Watson & More Best Moments From the 2026 Montreal International Jazz Festival - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: From June 25-July 4, the world's biggest jazz festival drew record-sized crowds with superstar headliners and rising talent, spotlighting traditional music across jazz, hip-hop, R&B, Afrobeats, Latin music and more. Montreal International Jazz Festival 2026. The world’s biggest jazz festival has continued its sonic expansion this year, once again incorporating Afrobeats, hip-hop, traditional Latin and Arabic music and much more into its programming, alongside traditional jazz and soul. From Angine de Poitrine’s historic performance to Domi and JD Beck previewing their entire unreleased album, plus a slew of special guests on the main stage, here are some of the blockbuster moments that defined the 2026 Montreal International Jazz Festival. Angine de Poitrine at the Montreal International Jazz Festival 2026 Benoît Rousseau. Angine de Poitrine continues to grow as the world's hottest rock band, and their set at the Montreal Jazz Fest welcomed a record, global headliner-sized crowd. Patrick Watson at the Montreal International Jazz Festival 2026Productions Novak.
recentArticles.summary: Angine de Poitrine, Patrick Watson & More Best Moments From the 2026 Montreal International Jazz Festival - Billboard Canada

recentArticles.title: Bob Seger tribute band to play Lexington park concert - Times Herald
recentArticles.snippet: # Bob Seger tribute band to play Lexington park concert. A Bob Seger tribute band is set to take the stage as part of a summer concert series in Lexington. KatMandu will perform at 7:30 p.m. July 17 at Patrick Tierney Memorial Park, according to a community announcement. The concert is part of the Lexington Arts Council’s “Music in the Park” series and is sponsored by Stifel. The band is described as a longtime Michigan-based group that celebrates the music of Rock and Roll Hall of Fame artist Bob Seger, according to the announcement. The show will take place at Patrick Tierney Memorial Park, two blocks east of the village traffic light in Lexington. Food and refreshments will be available nearby, and visitors can stop at local establishments before heading to the concert. Additional parking options and a free shuttle service will be provided throughout the village. * St. Matthew Lutheran Church, 7155 Huron Ave. More information about the event is available at lexington-arts.org.
recentArticles.summary: Bob Seger tribute band to play Lexington park concert - Times Herald

recentArticles.snippet: # 12 Beauty Details You May Have Missed at the 2026 BET Awards. On Sunday night, Doechii, Tyla, and Jaafar Jackson were just a few of the stars who gathered at the Peacock Theater in Los Angeles to celebrate Black excellence in film, music, sports, and more for the 26th annual BET Awards. The actor, musician, director, and all-around fashion icon took home a whopping four trophies for icon of the year, best actress, video director of the year, and the inaugural fashion vanguard award—with a winning beauty look to match. Here, we break down all this and more of the best beauty details you may’ve missed from last night. *Have a beauty or wellness trend you're curious about? recentArticles.title: The New Jackass Movie Does Something Hollywood Franchises Never Do Anymore: Say Goodbye And End - Kotaku
recentArticles.snippet: # The New *Jackass* Movie Does Something Hollywood Franchises Never Do Anymore: Say Goodbye And End. *Jackass: Best and Last* is like a perfect greatest-hits album designed for longtime fans of the series. There’s a moment at the very end of *Jackass: Best and Last* that stuck with me. It’s a moment that would have felt out of place in an earlier *Jackass* movie, but here, after 25 years, a TV show, and over a half dozen films and spin-off movies, the franchise and its injured stars have earned this tender moment. And as usual, with this new film, *Jackass* does something few other Hollywood franchises do anymore: end gracefully, on the terms of the creators, and in a way that feels perfect and satisfying. *Best and Last* is less a movie and more a visual greatest-hits album, and like the best of those albums, it mixes in new and old content to create something both retrospective and celebratory.
recentArticles.summary: The New Jackass Movie Does Something Hollywood Franchises Never Do Anymore: Say Goodbye And End - Kotaku
